explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: The Kellanova 2024 Form 10-K references compliance with AI regulations. This document states a commitment to meeting external requirements related to AI regulations.
external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Publish third-party audit results, certifications, or regulatory compliance documentation.

relevant_sources.summary: The Kellanova 2024 Form 10-K filing, a final annual report before the Mars acquisition, provides evidence for **governance** and **external accountability**. The document highlights AI as a regulatory area and mentions AI regulations and compliance risk, indicating the company's awareness of the need for governance to ensure adherence to laws and regulations. Furthermore, the mention of compliance with AI regulations directly supports the external accountability pillar by demonstrating a commitment to meeting external requirements.
relevant_sources.title: Kellanova 2024 Form 10-K (Final Annual Report Before Mars Acquisition)

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: The Kellanova 2024 Form 10-K references AI as a regulatory area, including AI regulations and associated compliance risk. This document states awareness of the need for governance to ensure adherence to laws and regulations concerning AI.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The Kellanova 2024 Form 10-K filing, a final annual report before the Mars acquisition, provides evidence for **governance** and **external accountability**. The document highlights AI as a regulatory area and mentions AI regulations and compliance risk, indicating the company's awareness of the need for governance to ensure adherence to laws and regulations. Furthermore, the mention of compliance with AI regulations directly supports the external accountability pillar by demonstrating a commitment to meeting external requirements.
relevant_sources.title: Kellanova 2024 Form 10-K (Final Annual Report Before Mars Acquisition)

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Kellanova's 2024 Form 10-K states a commitment to meeting external requirements related to AI regulations, which is one of two responsible AI pillars addressed at the policy level. The company's published materials also reference AI as a regulatory area and AI regulations under the governance pillar, bringing the total to 2 of 7 evaluated pillars with documented evidence. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars, based on 10 publicly available sources.
